sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88881" key="prosdiapore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσδιᾰπορέω</orth>, <sense id="n88881.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">raise questions besides</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.42f</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48a</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">669f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
